testcases.input: rectangles = [[0,0,2,2],[1,0,2,3],[1,0,3,1]] Output: 6 Explanation: A total area of 6 is covered by all three rectangles, as illustrated in the picture. From (1,1) to (2,2), the green and red rectangles overlap. From (1,0) to (2,3), all three rectangles overlap.
